chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI S.C.R.A. No. 834 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on CMA No. 885/2023. 2) For hearing of main case. 3) For orders on CMA No. 886/2023. 15.05.2025. None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. On the last date of hearing, following order was passed:- “Counsel holds brief for Ms. Anila Jameel Mughal and requests for adjournment, as she is not available. Matter is pending since 2023 and no effort has been made to even get the notice issued. Reluctantly, as a last and final chance, adjourned with a note of caution that if Counsel does not assist, no further indulgence would be granted. To come up on 15.05.2025.” Today, none has affected appearance; therefore, this Reference Application is dismissed for non prosecution. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/

To come up on 15.05.2025.” Today, none has affected appearance; therefore, this Reference Application is dismissed for non prosecution. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/ ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI S.C.R.A. No. 834 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on CMA No. 885/2023. 2) For hearing of main case. 3) For orders on CMA No. 886/2023. 08.05.2025. Mr. S. M. Azad holding brief for Ms. Anila Jameel Mughal, Advocate for Applicant. ______________ Counsel holds brief for Ms. Anila Jameel Mughal and requests for adjournment, as she is not available. Matter is pending since 2023 and no effort has been made to even get the notice issued. Reluctantly, as a last and final chance, adjourned with a note of caution that if Counsel does not assist, no further indulgence would be granted. To come up on 15.05.2025. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
